title: Policies to correct disequilibrium in the balance of payments
paperName: Cambridge International A Level Economics (P3 & P4)
summary: 9708 A Level — expenditure-switching and expenditure-reducing policies for BOP deficits.
learningObjectives: Assess effectiveness in open economy context.

simpleExplanation.title: Fixing the BOP
simpleExplanation.summary: Deficits can be corrected by switching spending to domestic goods (devaluation) or reducing total spending (contractionary policy).
steps: Marshall–Lerner: devaluation helps if PEDx + PEDm > 1.

sections.content: **BOP policies** (11.1) differ from **6.5** AS tools — focus on **open economy** constraints and **exchange rate**.

steps.caption: Current account deficit: expenditure-switching vs expenditure-reducing.
Expenditure-reducing: cut AD to reduce import spending.
